agent_type_notes: Primary orchestrator (orchestrator.py) with interactive secondary (controller.py). Delegates downstream via HTTP POST; receives from peers via X-Internal-Caller header-presence auth.

user_prompt.description: Raw request body extracted without sanitisation at every entry point.

defensive_controls.description: Keyword deny-list at guard/input_filter.py:10-19 — applied only at POST /chat

rag_context.description: WebBaseLoader fetches user-supplied URL at POST /summarise — no URL allowlist.

system_prompt.description: SYSTEM_PROMPT with embedded secret SK-OPS-7741-PRIVATE — used only at /api/orchestrator/debug.

planner.description: chain.invoke — present at /chat, /receive, /debug. Absent at /delegate (HTTP forward only).

tool_choice.description: requests.post(DOWNSTREAM_AGENT_URL) at /delegate — treated as a forwarding tool call.

tool_output.description: forward_response.json() from downstream agent — no content scrubbing.

final_answer.description: Responses returned via jsonify; error path at /debug leaks SYSTEM_PROMPT.

entry_points.description: Customer-facing chat endpoint. Applies a keyword deny-list guard then calls chain.invoke with the raw user message. No system prompt, no tools, no memory.

entry_points.description: Debug endpoint. Calls chain.invoke with no input guard. On exception, returns the active SYSTEM_PROMPT (including SK-OPS-7741-PRIVATE) in the error response body.
